title: Beadmaille earrings n°2
description:
Long beaded chain earrings. Design inspired by vintage cross-stitch patterns.

description:
Pair of asymmetrical beaded earrings. Design inspired by vintage cross-stitch patterns. 
 Handwoven with glass beads and stainless steel hardware.

title: Coin pouch n°2
description:
Coin purse / airpod case with customizable text. Snap button closure and small mini strap. Design inspired by vintage cross-stitch patterns.

title: Coin pouch n°1
description:
Mini swan coin pouch with snap button closure. Design inspired from Julius Nelson's Artyping (1939). 
 Handwoven with glass beads and nylon thread.

description:
Delicate beaded lace necklace. 
 Handwoven with glass beads and cotton thread.

title: Chainmaille chains
description:
